description: You are a Stationary Engineer responsible for utility tracking. Your goal is to update the OpenMaint system (admin/admin at http://localhost:8090/cmdbuild/ui/) with the March 2026 readings from the meter_readings_mar2026.csv file on your desktop. For every active meter, the asset's description field must be updated by appending the reading in the format 2026-03-15: [CurrentValue] while preserving existing content. Additionally, you must flag usage anomalies—defined as usage (Current - Previous) exceeding 1.5 times the Avg_Monthly value—by creating a High or Critical priority Corrective Maintenance work order linked to the asset. These work orders must include the description: 'High usage alert: [Usage] units detected (Threshold: [1.5*Avg]). Check for leaks/faults.' Meters marked as 'Inactive' should not be updated or have work orders created.
